arts.ttl: Inside Narcis Pelach's first Stoke press conference with transfer verdict
arts.sum: Narcis Pelach arrived at Stoke City two-and-a-half weeks after the summer transfer window had shut so it was interesting, as he talked about wanting to build a versatile team, to know if he then thought he had the tools at his disposal to do so. “No, I don’t want to ask for anything,” he said.

arts.ttl: Jon Walters accepts pressure as he makes biggest call yet at Stoke City
arts.sum: Walters, who returned as sporting director in March, knows he will come under scrutiny and pressure to deliver after ending Steven Schumacher’s reign and giving Narcis Pelach his first chance as a head coach in the Championship. He said: "Ultimately it's not a nice thing in football, it's not an easy thing to do but it's my role to not sit on the fence and wait for things to peter out so you can make a decision with no pressure.

arts.ttl: Why key Hull City transfer deadline day deal came as a 'surprise'
arts.sum: "It was a little bit of a surprise, but Mark Robins clearly backs the other players that he's got," Goodman told Betway. Palmer, who came off the bench to make his Tigers debut in the second half of the defeat at Leeds United prior to the international break, and then came off the bench to have a positive impact against Sheffield United on Friday night, was in the final year of his contract at the CBS Arena and discussions over an extension to the deal he signed in 2022 had made little progress.

arts.sum: Stoke City paid compensation to bring Dean Whitehead in from Barnsley with Darrell Clarke admitting the coach ‘couldn’t… The post ‘Couldn’t turn down’ – League One side land compensation as 42-year-old makes Stoke City move appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: David Prutton reveals Steven Schumacher conversation before making shock Stoke City vs Hull prediction
arts.sum: Following a week of upheaval at the bet365 Stadium, Stoke City will be hoping to conclude another change of manager with a Friday night victory over Hull City. And Hull will bring a warning all of their own to the bet365 Stadium when they look to win a first game this season after also changing their manager.

arts.ttl: Hull City's predicted starting XI to face Stoke City as Kasey Palmer decision made
arts.sum: The big decision will surround who gets the nod on the flanks with Millar almost certain to return on the left, which could enable Kamara to play on his favoured right - he started on the left against United - or he may stick with Belloumi on the right. Along with Kamara, Ryan Giles was hauled off at the interval with Cody Drameh coming on in his place, and that may be something Walter continues with on Friday night.

arts.ttl: 'No hiding' admits Hull City's Ryan Giles as Tigers try to settle into new way of working
arts.sum: Ryan Giles admits there can be no hiding from the amount of change at Hull City during the summer, as the Tigers' dressing room gets to grips with Tim Walter's new philosophy. "It has taken time to adapt to and even the new players coming in now, I know it will be challenging for them, but I think difference is good and that we can use it to our advantage.
